mapper.select:
SELECT ass.id, ass.task_id, ass.user_id, ass.submission_status, ass.answer_content, ass.video_url, ass.document_url, ass.draft_flag, ass.auto_score, ass.manual_score, ass.final_score, ass.teacher_comment, ass.submit_time, ass.reviewed_by, ass.reviewed_time, ass.create_time, ass.update_time,
ast.task_name, ast.task_type, ast.task_dimension, ast.task_description, ast.scoring_standard,
ti.name AS tag_name,
si.NAME AS staff_name, si.staff_sex AS staff_sex, si.images AS staff_images, si.phone AS staff_phone,
FROM assessment_submission ass LEFT JOIN assessment_task ast ON (ast.id = ass.task_id) LEFT JOIN staff_info si ON (si.id = ass.user_id) LEFT JOIN tag_info ti on (ti.id = ast.tag_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ast.task_name like CONCAT("%",#{queryForm.taskName},"%")
AND ti.name like CONCAT("%",#{queryForm.tagName},"%")
AND ast.task_type = #{queryForm.taskType}
AND si.NAME like CONCAT("%",#{queryForm.staffName},"%")
ORDER BY ass.create_time DESC
